summary: Same-Origin Proxy Routing VERIFIED - ALL TESTS PASSED. Backend API returns proxy URLs (/api/media/r2/{key}?w=480&q=80) for ALL thumbnail_small_url and poster_url fields. Dashboard loads 30 images via same-origin proxy with 0 direct R2 CDN URLs. Proxy endpoint returns HTTP 200 with correct CORS headers. Landing page renders correctly (no regressions).
critical_code_review_comments: engagement.py _shape_item() correctly returns proxy URLs via _proxy_img() - VERIFIED
Dashboard.js line 99: Uses `${API}${current.poster_url}` for hero image - CORRECT
Dashboard.js line 262: Uses `${API}${story.thumbnail_small_url}` for story cards - CORRECT
media_proxy.py handles /api/media/r2/{path} with CORS headers (Access-Control-Allow-Origin: *) - VERIFIED
Proxy URLs include resize params: ?w=480&q=80 for cards, ?w=1200&q=85 for posters - VERIFIED
context_for_next_testing_agent: Same-origin proxy routing verified. Key findings: 1) API returns proxy URLs (/api/media/r2/{key}) for ALL image fields, 2) Zero direct R2 CDN URLs (pub-xxx.r2.dev) in API responses, 3) Dashboard loads 30 images via proxy, 4) Proxy returns HTTP 200 with Content-Type: image/jpeg and Access-Control-Allow-Origin: *, 5) Landing page works with no regressions.
